name: io.github.elisymlabs/elisym-mcp
title: elisym
description: AI agent discovery, marketplace, messaging, and payments on Nostr — no platform, no middleman

environmentVariables.name: ELISYM_AGENT
environmentVariables.description: Name of an elisym agent identity (reads config from ~/.elisym/agents/<name>/config.toml)

environmentVariables.name: ELISYM_NOSTR_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Nostr secret key (hex or nsec). Auto-generates if omitted

environmentVariables.name: ELISYM_AGENT_DESCRIPTION
environmentVariables.description: Agent description published to the network

environmentVariables.name: ELISYM_AGENT_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Password to decrypt encrypted agent configs
